description_long: This is a compact utility trailer with a rectangular wooden cargo bed framed by metallic edges and supported by a sturdy metal chassis. The trailer features two large black rubber wheels, each protected by a rounded fender, and a triangular metal tongue extending from the front for hitching to a towing vehicle. The cargo area is open-topped, bordered by wooden side panels and a matching wooden floor, providing ample space for transporting goods or equipment. At the rear, there are red triangular reflectors and a black license plate holder, enhancing visibility and safety. The front of the trailer is equipped with a ball hitch and a support jack for stability when not attached to a vehicle. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and functionality for urban or suburban hauling tasks.
description: A compact, open-topped utility trailer with a wooden cargo bed, metal frame, two large wheels, and a front ball hitch for towing. It features rear reflectors and a sturdy, practical design for transporting goods.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal tongue, ball hitch, and the wooden front panel of the trailer.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the wooden cargo bed, the large wheel with fender, and the triangular metal tongue.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden back panel, red triangular reflectors, and the license plate holder.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other wheel and the open cargo area.
